highlights.text: That footprint is the Failed Breakdown and its how institutions long: They wait for a vicious sell lower and for price to flush a low.
This was a rapid, elevator down sell.
In today’s newsletter, I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the fantastic Failed Breakdowns we’ve seen the last few days - its been a goldmine for learning.

post_title: A Rare 3 Red Days For SPX. Can Bulls Step Back In? December 17 Plan
